title: 守株待兔
meaning: 比喻死守狭隘经验，不知变通，或妄想不劳而获。

scenes.title: 辛勤耕种
scenes.description: The farmer boy is working hard in a green field under a bright sun, holding a hoe, looking sweaty but determined.
scenes.prompt: A cute, round farmer boy with short black hair, wearing simple beige linen clothes and a straw hat. He has a friendly but naive expression. The art style is warm, soft watercolor illustration, pastel colors, gentle lighting, suitable for children aged 3-8., A cute farmer boy with short black hair, wearing beige linen clothes and a straw hat, working hard in a lush green field with a hoe, bright sunny day, soft watercolor illustration, warm pastel tones, gentle lighting --ar 4:3, Wide angle shot showing the vast field and the small figure of the farmer., Soft watercolor illustration, warm pastel tones, gentle lighting, clean background, suitable for children's book, high quality, detailed texture.
scenes.compositionHint: Wide angle shot showing the vast field and the small figure of the farmer.
scenes.narration: 从前有个农夫，天天起早贪黑，在田里辛苦干活。

scenes.title: 意外撞树
scenes.description: A white rabbit runs wildly and accidentally bumps into a large tree stump near the field, falling down dizzy.
scenes.prompt: A cute, round farmer boy with short black hair, wearing simple beige linen clothes and a straw hat. He has a friendly but naive expression. The art style is warm, soft watercolor illustration, pastel colors, gentle lighting, suitable for children aged 3-8., A fluffy white rabbit running fast and bumping into a large old tree stump, looking dizzy, the farmer boy watching in surprise nearby, soft watercolor illustration, warm pastel tones, dynamic action --ar 4:3, Close-up on the collision point between the rabbit and the tree., Soft watercolor illustration, warm pastel tones, gentle lighting, clean background, suitable for children's book, high quality, detailed texture.
scenes.compositionHint: Close-up on the collision point between the rabbit and the tree.
scenes.narration: 一天，一只兔子跑得飞快，'砰'的一声，撞在树桩上晕倒了。

scenes.title: 捡兔美梦
scenes.description: The farmer boy picks up the unconscious rabbit happily, smiling broadly, with sparkles around him indicating joy.
scenes.prompt: A cute, round farmer boy with short black hair, wearing simple beige linen clothes and a straw hat. He has a friendly but naive expression. The art style is warm, soft watercolor illustration, pastel colors, gentle lighting, suitable for children aged 3-8., The farmer boy picking up the white rabbit happily, big smile on his face, magical sparkles around him, soft watercolor illustration, warm pastel tones, joyful atmosphere --ar 4:3, Medium shot focusing on the farmer's happy expression and the rabbit., Soft watercolor illustration, warm pastel tones, gentle lighting, clean background, suitable for children's book, high quality, detailed texture.
scenes.compositionHint: Medium shot focusing on the farmer's happy expression and the rabbit.
scenes.narration: 农夫白捡了一只大肥兔，心里乐开了花，想：这下不用干活也有肉吃了！

scenes.title: 扔掉农具
scenes.description: The farmer boy throws his hoe away carelessly and sits down by the tree stump, waiting lazily.
scenes.prompt: A cute, round farmer boy with short black hair, wearing simple beige linen clothes and a straw hat. He has a friendly but naive expression. The art style is warm, soft watercolor illustration, pastel colors, gentle lighting, suitable for children aged 3-8., The farmer boy tossing his hoe aside and sitting lazily next to the tree stump, looking relaxed and expectant, soft watercolor illustration, warm pastel tones, casual pose --ar 4:3, Side view showing the discarded tool and the waiting farmer., Soft watercolor illustration, warm pastel tones, gentle lighting, clean background, suitable for children's book, high quality, detailed texture.
scenes.compositionHint: Side view showing the discarded tool and the waiting farmer.
scenes.narration: 从此，他不再种地，天天守在树桩旁，等着捡兔子。

scenes.title: 苦苦等待
scenes.description: Days pass, the sun rises and sets, seasons change slightly, the farmer boy is still sitting by the tree, looking tired but hopeful.
scenes.prompt: A cute, round farmer boy with short black hair, wearing simple beige linen clothes and a straw hat. He has a friendly but naive expression. The art style is warm, soft watercolor illustration, pastel colors, gentle lighting, suitable for children aged 3-8., Time lapse effect, sun rising and setting behind the farmer boy sitting by the tree stump, leaves falling, farmer looks tired but keeps waiting, soft watercolor illustration, warm pastel tones, melancholic but cute --ar 4:3, Long shot showing the passage of time and the isolated figure., Soft watercolor illustration, warm pastel tones, gentle lighting, clean background, suitable for children's book, high quality, detailed texture.
scenes.compositionHint: Long shot showing the passage of time and the isolated figure.
scenes.narration: 可是，一天过去了，两天过去了，再也没有兔子来撞树了。

scenes.title: 田地荒芜
scenes.description: The field behind the farmer is overgrown with weeds and dry, while he remains ignorant by the tree stump.
scenes.prompt: A cute, round farmer boy with short black hair, wearing simple beige linen clothes and a straw hat. He has a friendly but naive expression. The art style is warm, soft watercolor illustration, pastel colors, gentle lighting, suitable for children aged 3-8., Background shows the farmer's field full of dry weeds and barren soil, foreground shows the farmer still sitting by the tree stump, soft watercolor illustration, contrast between busy nature and lazy farmer --ar 4:3, Over-the-shoulder shot from behind the farmer, focusing on the ruined field., Soft watercolor illustration, warm pastel tones, gentle lighting, clean background, suitable for children's book, high quality, detailed texture.
scenes.compositionHint: Over-the-shoulder shot from behind the farmer, focusing on the ruined field.
scenes.narration: 他的田地长满了野草，庄稼都枯死了，他也没等到第二只兔子。

scenes.title: 后悔莫及
scenes.description: The farmer boy stands up, looking at his ruined field with regret and sadness, holding his empty hands.
scenes.prompt: A cute, round farmer boy with short black hair, wearing simple beige linen clothes and a straw hat. He has a friendly but naive expression. The art style is warm, soft watercolor illustration, pastel colors, gentle lighting, suitable for children aged 3-8., The farmer boy standing up, looking at the withered field with sad and regretful expression, tears in eyes, soft watercolor illustration, emotional mood --ar 4:3, Close-up on the farmer's sad face and regretful eyes., Soft watercolor illustration, warm pastel tones, gentle lighting, clean background, suitable for children's book, high quality, detailed texture.
scenes.compositionHint: Close-up on the farmer's sad face and regretful eyes.
scenes.narration: 农夫看着荒掉的田地，后悔极了，可一切都太晚了。
